title: Scotch Double Sided Tape, Transparent Mounting Tape, 19mm x 1.5m, For Indoor Use - No tools needed - Holds up to 7 kg
features: INVISIBLE TAPE FOR INDOOR USE: This transparent tape is intended for indoor use and is ideal for mounting your décor on glass, tile, acrylic and metal

HOLDS UP TO 7 KG: This double-sided mounting tape can support up to 7 kg (1kg/20cm), making it ideal for invisible hold and repair of transparent decorative objects on glass windows or acrylic objects
UV RESISTANT: The Scotch-FIX Transparent mounting tape is UV resistant, not yellowing
ADVANCED 3M TECHNOLOGY: Featuring 100% adhesive with 3M Advanced Technology, this double sided tape provides a reliable and long-lasting hold; ideal for quick and easy mounting solutions
EASY TO USE: No tools or drilling needed for the application of this double-sided 3M mounting tape; ideal for quick and easy mounting solutions

APPLICATION GUIDE: Ensure surface is flat, smooth, and can to hold mounted objects; entire tape surface must adhere completely to both sides; application temperature 10° C - 40° C; clean the surface with alcohol and let dry; apply the tape; push firmly for 60 seconds
WARNING: Do not hang in areas where injury might occur if mounted object were to fall; this product has a permanent adhesive and may cause damage if removed; do not use on delicate or curved surfaces
description: From the manufacturer Scotch-Fix Transparent Mounting Tape with 3M Advanced Technology. Designed For: Glass, Tile, Acrylic and Metal Intended for indoor use Delivers a strong, permanent bond on contact Virtually clear, this double sided permanent tape is perfect for mounting glass, tiles and artwork. It's a superior strong bond, which holds up to 7kg thanks to 3M Advanced Technology. So whether you're mounting acrylic cosmetic organizers or a translucent picture frame, fix it confidently with Scotch-Fix Transparent Double-Sided Mounting Tape.
